items.title: Mark Ruffalo to Rep. Hakeem Jeffries: “Stop taking AIPAC money & serve YOUR country. Fight like we have been taken over by a lawless fascist regime in cahoots with another lawless fascist religious regime that is waging an illegal war in Iran… Fight like a man who has some moral fiber.”
items.title_en: Mark Ruffalo to Rep. Hakeem Jeffries: “Stop taking AIPAC money & serve YOUR country. Fight like we have been taken over by a lawless fascist regime in cahoots with another lawless fascist religious regime that is waging an illegal war in Iran… Fight like a man who has some moral fiber.”
